purpose: Close the remaining gap between runtime hard-gate policy and evidence collection: production live smoke must write a current artifact and the hard-gate report must evaluate it before allowing teacher-pilot/runtime claims.
requiredEvidence: npm ci exits 0 and installs Next/SWC
.next/BUILD_ID and required server manifests exist from the current build
artifacts/live-http-smoke-last-run.json has ok=true, smokeMode=production, and batch98RealAccountSaveExportSmoke=true
npm run auth-invite:runtime-smoke passes for invite/reuse/revoked/expired/self-elevation guards
GIAOAN_DEMO_URL=https://<hosted-url> npm run hosted:url-smoke passes before hostedClosure/publicDemoReady can be claimed
noOverclaimRules: Production live smoke pass is local runtime evidence, not hosted evidence.
Hosted closure remains blocked until strict hosted URL smoke passes.
Do not add AI, payment, marketplace, public community auto-publish, or fake verified data while hosted proof is missing.
